descriptionTemplates: The crew studies the safest route to bring {targetName} to {planetName}.
A quick recon of {planetName}'s transit corridors sketches out a route for {targetName}.
{enemyGroupName} springs an ambush on the convoy not far from {planetName}.
The convoy takes fire from {enemyGroupName}, lying in wait along the road to {planetName}.
Wounded in the skirmish, {targetName} must be stabilized before the ship arrives.
The crew improvises makeshift care to keep {targetName} alive until liftoff.
Scout {securityGroupName}'s patrol rotations before the assault on {targetCorpName}'s vault.
The crew maps out {targetCorpName}'s defenses, under the watchful eye of {securityGroupName}.
Crack {targetCorpName}'s vault encryption before the alarm trips.
Bypass {targetCorpName}'s security protocols to reach the heart of the vault.
Shake off {securityGroupName}'s agents chasing the getaway convoy across {planetName}.
The crew melts into the crowds of {planetName} to escape {securityGroupName}.
Silently disable the sensor network of the facility on {planetName}.
Short out the perimeter sensors before they alert the facility on {planetName}.
Plant the charges at the heart of the facility without alerting {enemyGroupName}'s guards.
Rig the critical structural points while {enemyGroupName} patrols nearby.
Flee the facility on {planetName} before the blast tears through the sector.
Run for the extraction point as {planetName} shakes under the shockwave.
Breach the perimeter held by {enemyGroupName} on {planetName} without triggering an alert.
Slip between {enemyGroupName}'s patrols to reach the heart of the zone.
Gather evidence on {enemyGroupName}'s activities without being spotted.
Intercept {enemyGroupName}'s communications to build a complete file.
Blend into the scenery of {planetName} to evade {enemyGroupName}'s last patrols.
Improvise a convincing cover story against {enemyGroupName}'s men posted at the exit.
Secure an audience with {targetName} despite the rigid diplomatic protocols.
Approach {targetName} through unofficial channels before negotiations open.
Negotiate acceptable terms with {targetName} under pressure from {enemyGroupName}.
Find common ground with {targetName} before {enemyGroupName} derails the talks.
Withstand {enemyGroupName}'s intimidation tactics until the final signature.
Hold firm against {enemyGroupName}'s last manipulations before closing the deal.
Locate {targetName}, held somewhere within {enemyGroupName}'s facilities.
Cross-reference the clues to find the cell where {enemyGroupName} is holding {targetName}.
Break through {enemyGroupName}'s defenses to reach {targetName}'s cell.
Take down {enemyGroupName}'s guards before they execute {targetName}.
Cover {targetName}'s retreat as {enemyGroupName} throws in reinforcements.
Fight a path back to the ship with {targetName}, {enemyGroupName} hot on their heels.
